facts_about_Tester: Tester asked to test the system.

episodic_memory: User Tester asked to test the system.

facts_about_Yonnel.detail: His favorite animal is the Tiger.
He mistook the AI's name (RUA) for 'Roa'.

episodic_memory: human: My name is Yonnel. | ai: Nice to meet you, Yonnel! I'm RUA, your AI buddy - ready to dish out witty banter and helpful info, one conversation at a time! | human: My favorite animal is Tiger. | ai: A roaring good choice, Yonnel! Tigers are majestic, powerful, and oh-so-cool! What's it about them that gets your stripes? | human: Hello Roa! | ai: Yonnel, I think there's been a mix-up - my name is RUA, not Roa! Let's start fresh, what's on your mind?
human: What is my favorite animal? | ai: Yonnel, I'm pretty sure you mentioned the Tiger, but just in case, let me check our previous chat... Ah yes, it's confirmed! You're a tiger fan, no Roa here!
